18.sourceTitle: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - 44mm

37.sourceTitle: CoreCap Valve Cap Set - BBB Cycling
37.evidenceText: Product information Features Size guide Specifications Spare parts Find a dealer.
37.extractionRationale: The page mentions a 'Spare parts' section but the actual SKU details, valve cores, seals, o-rings, and replacement kit information are not included in the provided content excerpt. Without the complete spare parts list, an accurate count cannot be determined.

45.evidenceText: DT Swiss offers various tubeless valve options in alloy and brass across different rim profile heights, with no mention of Clik valve adoption in their 2026/2027 product lines.
45.extractionRationale: Available evidence shows DT Swiss uses proprietary tubeless valves. No sources provided evidence of Clik adoption by any of the six major brands (DT Swiss, Mavic, Hunt, Zipp, ENVE, Roval). Based on the one brand with available evidence, the percentage is 0%.

57.evidenceText: CoreCap is the ultimate solution for tubeless riders who value comfort and performance. No more tedious bending or breaking of delicate Presta cores.
57.extractionRationale: The evidence from all 5 BIKE24 sources contains only product descriptions and listings without any information about stock status, availability dates, or restock timing. No "back in stock" dates or current availability indicators are present in any source.
